title: JSON Formatter & Validator
seoDescription: Free online JSON formatter, validator, and beautifier. Pretty print, minify, and validate JSON instantly. Perfect for developers working with APIs, configs, and data.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the JSON Formatter
step1Desc: Paste your JSON data into the input field. It can be minified, unformatted, or messy.
step2Desc: Click Format to pretty-print with indentation, Minify to compress, or Validate to check syntax.
step3Desc: Copy the formatted, minified, or validated JSON to use in your projects, APIs, or config files.
faq1A: Common issues include trailing commas, missing quotes around keys, single quotes, or comments. This tool highlights the exact error position.
faq3Q: Can it handle large JSON files?
faq3A: Yes, but very large files (>10MB) may be slow. For production, use command-line tools like jq.
